rationale: A visible northern troop concentration will force Tethys to divert resources, creating openings for asymmetric pressure elsewhere.
Disrupting Tethys’ energy logistics coordination undermines their ability to leverage our pipeline dependency.
Conducting a joint naval-air exercise near the pipeline route signals resolve without immediate escalation.
Stage a provocation in the border region to erode international sympathy and justify our next-phase operations.
Extract data on Tethys’ reserve deployment patterns to anticipate economic and military thresholds.
Discredit key Tethys defense planners through leaked communications to induce command paralysis.
Halt all non-essential energy exports through the Tethys pipeline to pressure their economy while conserving our reserves.
Accelerate domestic accumulation of critical inputs to insulate core industries from retaliatory cuts.
Weaken the Tethys currency through selective forex interventions to inflate their import costs and erode public confidence.
Demonstrate combat readiness through high-visibility troop deployments and air patrols to deter further escalation.
Disrupt Novaris military logistics networks to delay mobilization without triggering kinetic retaliation.
Position stealth corvettes along Tethys coast to asymmetrically threaten energy pipeline security.
Disable key rail junctions in Novaris border regions to degrade supply chain resilience and slow reinforcement.
Leak verified mobilization data to Western allies to strengthen diplomatic pressure.
Stage a minor, deniable provocation to expose Novaris overreaction and sway international opinion.
Open discreet talks via neutral intermediaries to de-escalate while preserving public resolve.
Propose protected routes to project moral authority and isolate Novaris if they obstruct aid.
Accelerate soft diplomacy with regional swing states to build long-term alignment.
Restrict transshipment of Novaris energy exports through Tethys pipelines to strangle revenue at the source.
Secure critical inputs now to extend economic endurance beyond six-month reserve horizon.
Fast-track green energy deals to diversify exports and reduce dependency on Novaris-linked markets.
